name: What’s the best low-cost way to improve Google Assistant results?
description: Start with local profile cleanup, a few strong FAQs, and basic speed fixes. Those are often the cheapest improvements with the best return.

mainEntity.name: What’s the best low-cost way to improve Google Assistant results?

acceptedAnswer.text: A business with limited budget should start with the highest-return basics: clean local profiles, a small set of FAQ pages, and speed fixes that improve mobile performance. Those changes are usually more valuable than chasing every possible voice-search tactic.
acceptedAnswer.description: Start with local profile cleanup, a few strong FAQs, and basic speed fixes. Those are often the cheapest improvements with the best return.
